name: Off-Target Analyzer
description: Acts as a genomic safety checkpoint by mathematically evaluating the off-target risk of candidate gRNAs and isolating the safest sequence for construct building.

inputs.name: candidate_gRNAs
inputs.description: List of scored candidate gRNA dictionaries from the Guide RNA Designer.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Target organism genome to scan for off-target sites.

inputs.name: cas_variant
inputs.description: Pass-through variable specifying the Cas enzyme.

inputs.name: target_gene
inputs.description: Pass-through variable specifying the target gene.

inputs.name: cell_type
inputs.description: Pass-through variable specifying the cell type.

inputs.name: edit_type
inputs.description: Pass-through variable specifying the editing modality.

inputs.name: kit_choice
inputs.description: Pass-through variable specifying the experimental kit or plasmid.

outputs.description: Structured JSON containing the safest guide_sequence, off_target_risk_profile, and pass-through metadata.
